I will be updating `ProfileModal.tsx`, `LandingPage.tsx`, and `HomeView.tsx`. I have added `manifest.json`. I am also removing the class input.

I am now addressing the misleading APK download. The text blob issue is solved by removing the `handleDownloadApk` function. It seems you downloaded a dummy text file that I was using to simulate the download process, which is why your phone says "Problem parsing the package" (it expects a real compiled Android app, not a text file). I have also **completely redesigned the Profile Section** to be clean, premium, and easy to understand, removing all the confusing system jargon and the "Class" field.
